hero.title: Urugendo rwawe ruragutegereje mu Isaro rya Afurika
hero.subtitle: Menya safari zitazibagirana, ibyiza nyaburanga bitangaje n'umuco ukungahaye hamwe na Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.

story.label: Explore Africa with
story.title: Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.
story.description: Kuva ku misozi itwikiriwe n'ibicu kugeza ku migezi minini, sobanukirwa Uganda mu buryo budasanzwe.
story.p1: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> is a destination management company established in Uganda, specializing in authentic, smooth, and memorable journeys across East Africa. From misty mountains and dense rainforests to serene lakes, mighty rivers, and warm local hospitality, we design travel experiences that feel personal, polished, and deeply connected to place.
story.p2: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> offers carefully tailored safaris for families, couples, groups, and private explorers seeking something more meaningful than an ordinary holiday. Our journeys bring together wildlife, culture, conservation, and comfort, creating an elegant way to encounter Uganda in its most beautiful and unforgettable form.

why.label: Urugendo rwawe. Ubunararibonye bwacu.
why.title: Kuki wahitamo Uganda Family Tours?
why.description: Dutegura ingendo zitazibagirana zikwinjiza mu muco, mu byiza nyaburanga no mu nyamaswa zo muri Uganda.
why.tailorText: Gahunda zitegurwa hagendewe ku byo wifuza.
why.localText: Abayobozi b'ingendo b'inararibonye kandi bakunda igihugu.

home.galleryTitle: Ibihe byiza byo mu ngendo zacu

toursPage.title: Ingendo zacu
toursPage.description: Safari zatoranyijwe neza zigenewe kukugeza ku rugendo rutazibagirana muri Uganda no muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba.
toursPage.ctaTitle: Urugendo rwawe ruragutegereje - reka dutegure inzozi zawe

tourDetails.quote: Twandikire tuguhe igiciro kijyanye n'urugendo rwawe

bookingForm.title: Iyandikishe kuri uru rugendo
bookingForm.subtitle: Tubwire uko wifuza kugenda, tuzagusubiza ku gihe kiboneka n'igiciro.
bookingForm.info: Tuzakuvugisha kuri email cyangwa WhatsApp kugira ngo twemeze.
bookingForm.success: Ubusabe bwo kwiyandikisha bwoherejwe neza. Tuzakuvugisha vuba.

inquiryForm.title: Ohereza ikibazo
inquiryForm.subtitle: Tubwire uko twagufasha, inzobere zacu zizagusubiza kuri email cyangwa WhatsApp.
inquiryForm.messagePlaceholder: Tubwire gahunda yawe cyangwa ibyo wifuza...

footer.about: Turi kompanyi y'umuryango ikorera hano, dutegura eco-safari zihariye muri Uganda no muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba.
footer.rights: © 2025 Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co. Uburenganzira bwose burabitswe.

welcome.label: Murakaza neza
welcome.title: Karibu!
welcome.p1: Murakaza neza muri Uganda Family Tours & Safari Company - umufatanyabikorwa wizewe mu ngendo z'umuryango zifite umutekano, zishimishije kandi zirengera ibidukikije mu Isaro rya Afurika.
welcome.p2: Turi ikipe y'abategura ingendo n'abayobozi bazo bakorera hano, twiyemeje gufasha imiryango kumenya ubwiza, inyamaswa n'umuco wa Uganda mu buryo bushimisha abana, buruhura ababyeyi kandi bwubaha ibidukikije.

origins.label: Inkuru yacu
origins.title: Aho twakomotse
origins.p1: Inkuru yacu yatangiriye ku rukundo dukunda ibidukikije, inyamaswa n'abantu badasanzwe ba Uganda. Ibyatangiye ari safari nto ziyobowe n'umuryango byakuze bihinduka intego yo gusangiza imiryango yo ku isi yose uburanga bwa Afurika.
origins.p2: Mu myaka ishize twubatse ubufatanye bwizewe, dutegura ingendo zifite umutekano kandi zitazibagirana, dukomeza indangagaciro zacu: ukuri, kurengera ibidukikije no kwita ku mukiriya.

initiatives.label: Ibidutera imbaraga
initiatives.title: Ibikorwa byacu
initiatives.description: Twiyemeje ingendo zifite inshingano no guteza imbere abaturage, inyamaswa n'ibidukikije muri Uganda.

responsible.title: Ubukerarugendo bufite inshingano
responsible.text: Duteza imbere uburyo bwo gutembera burengera ibidukikije, bufasha abaturage kandi bubungabunga umuco.

community.title: Guteza imbere abaturage
community.text: Dukorana n'abaturage mu gushyigikira uburezi, amahugurwa n'amahirwe y'ubukungu.

conservation.title: Gushyigikira kubungabunga inyamaswa
conservation.text: Dushyigikira gahunda zo kurengera inyamaswa n'aho ziba muri Uganda.

eco.title: Ingendo zirengera ibidukikije
eco.text: Dugabanya ingaruka ku bidukikije binyuze mu mikorere irambye no gutegura ingendo neza.

mammadu.title: The Mammadu Trust in Windhoek
mammadu.p1: The Mammadu Trust yashinzwe kwita no gufasha impfubyi, abana n'abagore bari mu buzima bugoye cyane. Twemera ko urugendo rufite inshingano rugomba kurema amahirwe nyayo ku rubyiruko n'imiryango.
mammadu.p2: Iyo ugarutse, umuyobozi wawe ashobora gutegura gusura aho inkunga ijya cyangwa kuguhuza n'abaturage, inkunga yawe igatangwa mu mucyo no mu bwitonzi.

orange.title: Orange Community Project
orange.p1: Dukorana n'amashuri n'amatsinda y'abaturage mu kunoza ibyumba by'ishuri, gutanga ibikoresho no gushyigikira imyigire ifatika y'abana mu byaro.
orange.p2: Uganda Family Tours ikomeza gushyigikira imishinga y'abaturage yatangijwe n'abayobozi b'inzego z'ibanze, igatanga inyungu zirambye zirenze safari imwe.

gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.title: Gukurikirana ingagi i Bwindi
gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.shortDescription: Genda mu ishyamba ry'inzitane uri kumwe n'abayobozi b'inararibonye uhure n'ingagi zo mu misozi mu buzima bwazo busanzwe.
gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.overview: Jya mu mutima w'ubwiza bw'ishyamba. Pariki ya Bwindi Impenetrable ibamo hafi kimwe cya kabiri cy'ingagi zo mu misozi zisigaye ku isi. Uru rugendo rw'iminsi 4 rutanga ubunararibonye butazibagirana mu ishyamba, mu muco no mu kubungabunga inyamaswa.

murchison-falls-safari.title: Safari ya Murchison Falls
murchison-falls-safari.shortDescription: Menya amasumo akomeye, game drive ishimishije n'urugendo rw'ubwato kuri Nile witegereza inyamaswa nyinshi.
murchison-falls-safari.overview: Jya mu mutima w'ubwiza bwa Uganda. Iyi gahunda ihuza inyamaswa zizwi, umuco, ibyiza nyaburanga n'ubwakiranyi bw'abanyagihugu.

queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.title: Safari y'inyamaswa muri Queen Elizabeth
queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.shortDescription: Sura inyamaswa zitandukanye, intare zizamuka ibiti, ibiyaga bya crater n'ibibaya bya savanna hamwe n'umuyobozi w'inararibonye.
queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.overview: Jya mu mutima w'ubwiza bwa Uganda. Iyi gahunda ihuza inyamaswa zizwi, umuco, ibyiza nyaburanga n'ubwakiranyi bw'abanyagihugu.

lake-bunyonyi-escape.title: Kuruhukira ku Kiyaga Bunyonyi
lake-bunyonyi-escape.shortDescription: Ruhukira ku kiyaga gituje, usure ibirwa, ugende mu bwato bwa canoe kandi wishimire ibyiza by'imisozi.
lake-bunyonyi-escape.overview: Jya mu mutima w'ubwiza bwa Uganda. Iyi gahunda ihuza inyamaswa zizwi, umuco, ibyiza nyaburanga n'ubwakiranyi bw'abanyagihugu.

chimpanzee-trekking.title: Gukurikirana chimpanzee
chimpanzee-trekking.shortDescription: Kurikirana chimpanzee mu ishyamba rya Kibale, wumve primates mu biti kandi ugende muri Bigodi wetland.
chimpanzee-trekking.overview: Jya mu mutima w'ubwiza bwa Uganda. Iyi gahunda ihuza inyamaswa zizwi, umuco, ibyiza nyaburanga n'ubwakiranyi bw'abanyagihugu.

cultural-uganda-experience.title: Ubunararibonye bw'umuco wa Uganda
cultural-uganda-experience.shortDescription: Injira mu muco w'aho, amafunguro gakondo, umuziki, inkuru, amasoko y'ubukorikori n'ubuzima bw'abaturage.
cultural-uganda-experience.overview: Jya mu mutima w'ubwiza bwa Uganda. Iyi gahunda ihuza inyamaswa zizwi, umuco, ibyiza nyaburanga n'ubwakiranyi bw'abanyagihugu.

itineraryDays.title: Kugera no gutangira urugendo
itineraryDays.description: Ugera ku kibuga cy'indege cyangwa aho muhurira, umuyobozi wa safari akakwakira akagusobanurira urugendo rutangiye.

itineraryDays.title: Gukurikirana ingagi no kujya Queen Elizabeth
itineraryDays.description: Winjira mu ishyamba ry'inzitane ku rugendo ruyobowe, nyuma ugakomereza mu misozi n'imidugudu werekeza muri Queen Elizabeth National Park.
activities: Ifunguro rya saa sita mu byanya nyaburanga
Kujya kuri lodge nimugoroba no kwiyandikisha
itineraryDays.details: Icumbi: lodge  Amafunguro: mu gitondo, saa sita, nimugoroba  Intera: 160km

itineraryDays.title: Gusura Queen Elizabeth
itineraryDays.description: Umunsi wose uwumara usura ibibaya bya savanna, ibiyaga bya crater n'inzira z'amazi bizwiho inzovu, imbogo, antelope n'inyoni.
activities: Urugendo rw'ubwato cyangwa kugenda mu bidukikije
itineraryDays.details: Icumbi: lodge  Amafunguro: mu gitondo, saa sita, nimugoroba  Intera: 80km

itineraryDays.title: Gusezera n'umuco
itineraryDays.description: Ishimire ifunguro rya mu gitondo rituje mbere yo gusubira, ufite umwanya wo gusura ubukorikori, abaturage cyangwa ahantu h'ibyiza nyaburanga.
itineraryDays.details: Icumbi: nta ryo  Amafunguro: mu gitondo  Intera: 280km

items.text: Byari ubunararibonye buhebuje kuva dutangiye kugeza dusoje. Abayobozi bari abahanga, b'inshuti kandi batumye urugendo rutazibagirana.
Byose byateguwe neza. Gukurikirana ingagi byari iby'ubuzima bwose. Turasaba cyane Uganda Family Tours!
Urugendo rutangaje rufite ibyiza nyaburanga n'inyamaswa zidasanzwe. Tuzagaruka muri Uganda!
Umuryango wacu witayeho muri buri ntambwe. Gahunda yari yuzuye, iteguwe neza kandi ifite ibihe byiza.
Safari yateguwe neza, abayobozi b'ineza, lodge nziza n'inyamaswa nyinshi mu rugendo rwose.
Gukurikirana ingagi byari iby'amarangamutima kandi ntibizibagirana. Uganda Family Tours yakoze byose neza kandi mu buryo bwihariye.
